title: Passive Voice
topics: be + past participle · tenses in passive · by-agent · causative
description: Trpný rod — kdy a jak ho použít.

examples.en: Active:  The chef is cooking dinner.
Active:  We will finish the project next week.
examples.cz: Passive: The project will be finished next week.

examples.en: Active:  They have cancelled the flight.
examples.cz: Passive: The flight has been cancelled.

tasks: 1. Rewrite these active sentences in passive:
2. Find 5 passive sentences in a news article
3. Write a short paragraph about how your favourite food is made
